event: Nonproductive cough, progressively increasing dyspnea for 7 days
Tracheal aspirate showed branching hyphae on direct examination
Culture on Malt Extract Agar and Sabouraud Dextrose Agar isolated A. fumigatus
Specific A. fumigatus quantitative PCR positive
Transthoracic echocardiogram showed hypertrophy and dilation of the right ventricle
Died of cardiac arrest suspect of massive pulmonary embolism
Antifungal susceptibility testing showed triazole resistance
Identified TR34/L98H mutation in cyp51A gene
